headline: CERTIFY EVERY TRIAL BATCH WITH CONFIDENCE
subheading: How the QP releases investigational medicines under Annex 13 when no marketing authorisation exists
flux_prompt: A clinical-luxury editorial background evoking the Qualified Person's certification of investigational medicines for clinical trials. Deep navy backdrop with flowing teal and cyan light, layered over a softly glowing release-decision motif: an abstract blinded clinical-supply carton and a row of numbered, label-coded trial vials rendered in frosted glass, each sealed and out of focus, suggesting provenance and chain of custody. A luminous teal checkmark of light hovers above a stylised batch-record document made of thin glowing lines, symbolising the evidence-based release judgement. Faint cyan data threads connect the carton, the document and the vials like a verified supply chain, with a single fresh-green accent glow marking the moment of approval. Immaculate reflective surfaces, shallow depth of field, premium sterile-yet-warm atmosphere, conceptual and abstract rather than literal. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
